revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
1 revision imported: importing redirects I created with chatGPT

revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{template shortcut|Quotefarm|Too many quotes|Excessive quotes}} === Usage === This template should not be [[Wikipedia:Substitution|substituted]]. If there are too many or overly lengthy quotations in a given article, paste this at the '''top of the article''' in question: : {{Tlx|Over-quotation|date{{=}}{{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}}} It takes a numbered or unnumbered first parameter as a substitute for the word "article", e.g. |section. Using {{para|section|yes}} or {{para|section|y}} will also output the specific word "section". Like all other cleanup templates, it accepts {{para|date|{{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}}} or |{{subst:DATE}}. For more specific wording, {{para|many|y}} limits the complaint to '''too many quotations''', while {{para|lengthy|y}} limits it to '''overly lengthy quotations'''. When an article uses both '''too many {{em|and}} overly lengthy quotations''', use neither parameter, or explicitly use {{para|both|y}} (trying {{para|many|y}}{{para|lengthy|y}} will suppress, not show, both). === Notes === This template will add tagged articles to dated subcategories of [[:Category:Wikipedia articles with style issues by month]] and to [[:Category:All articles with style issues]]. This [[Wikipedia:Template messages|template]] is a [[Wikipedia:Manual of Style/Self-references to avoid|self-reference]]. === TemplateData === {{TemplateData header}} { "params": { "1": { "label": "Affected area", "description": "Changes the affected area", "type": "string" }, "section": { "label": "Section", "description": "Marks the affected area as \"section\" instead of \"article\"", "type": "string", "autovalue": "y" }, "many": { "label": "Many", "description": "Limits the complaint to too many quotations", "type": "string", "autovalue": "y" }, "lengthy": { "label": "Lengthy", "description": "Limits it to overly lengthy quotations", "type": "string", "autovalue": "y" }, "both": { "label": "Both", "description": "Mark as both lengthy and many", "type": "string", "autovalue": "y" }, "date": { "label": "Month and year", "description": "The month and year that the template was placed (in full). \"May 2025\" inserts the current month and year automatically.", "example": "January 2013", "type": "string", "autovalue": "May 2025", "suggested": true } }, "description": "Hatnote used if there are too many and/or overly lengthy quotations in a given article.", "paramOrder": [ "section", "1", "many", "lengthy", "both", "date" ], "format": "inline" } === See also === * {{tl|Long quote}} (the inline version of this template) * [[Wikipedia:Template messages/Sources of articles]] * [[Wikipedia:Template messages/Cleanup]] {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Quotation cleanup templates]] }}

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{template shortcut|Quotefarm|Too many quotes|Excessive quotes}} === Usage === This template should not be [[Wikipedia:Substitution|substituted]]. If there are too many or overly lengthy quotations in a given article, paste this at the '''top of the article''' in question: : {{Tlx|Over-quotation|date{{=}}{{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}}} It takes a numbered or unnumbered first parameter as a substitute for the word "article", e.g. |section. Using {{para|section|yes}} or {{para|section|y}} will also output the specific word "section". Like all other cleanup templates, it accepts {{para|date|{{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}}} or |{{subst:DATE}}. For more specific wording, {{para|many|y}} limits the complaint to '''too many quotations''', while {{para|lengthy|y}} limits it to '''overly lengthy quotations'''. When an article uses both '''too many {{em|and}} overly lengthy quotations''', use neither parameter, or explicitly use {{para|both|y}} (trying {{para|many|y}}{{para|lengthy|y}} will suppress, not show, both). === Notes === This template will add tagged articles to dated subcategories of [[:Category:Wikipedia articles with style issues by month]] and to [[:Category:All articles with style issues]]. This [[Wikipedia:Template messages|template]] is a [[Wikipedia:Manual of Style/Self-references to avoid|self-reference]]. === TemplateData === {{TemplateData header}} { "params": { "1": { "label": "Affected area", "description": "Changes the affected area", "type": "string" }, "section": { "label": "Section", "description": "Marks the affected area as \"section\" instead of \"article\"", "type": "string", "autovalue": "y" }, "many": { "label": "Many", "description": "Limits the complaint to too many quotations", "type": "string", "autovalue": "y" }, "lengthy": { "label": "Lengthy", "description": "Limits it to overly lengthy quotations", "type": "string", "autovalue": "y" }, "both": { "label": "Both", "description": "Mark as both lengthy and many", "type": "string", "autovalue": "y" }, "date": { "label": "Month and year", "description": "The month and year that the template was placed (in full). \"May 2025\" inserts the current month and year automatically.", "example": "January 2013", "type": "string", "autovalue": "May 2025", "suggested": true } }, "description": "Hatnote used if there are too many and/or overly lengthy quotations in a given article.", "paramOrder": [ "section", "1", "many", "lengthy", "both", "date" ], "format": "inline" } === See also === * {{tl|Long quote}} (the inline version of this template) * [[Wikipedia:Template messages/Sources of articles]] * [[Wikipedia:Template messages/Cleanup]] {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Quotation cleanup templates]] }} [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{template shortcut|Quotefarm|Too many quotes|Excessive quotes}} === Usage === This template should not be [[Wikipedia:Substitution|substituted]]. If there are too many or overly lengthy quotations in a given article, paste this at the '''top of the article''' in question: : {{Tlx|Over-quotation|date{{=}}{{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}}} It takes a numbered or unnumbered first parameter as a substitute for the word "article", e.g. |section. Using {{para|section|yes}} or {{para|section|y}} will also output the specific word "section". Like all other cleanup templates, it accepts {{para|date|{{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}}} or |{{subst:DATE}}. For more specific wording, {{para|many|y}} limits the complaint to '''too many quotations''', while {{para|lengthy|y}} limits it to '''overly lengthy quotations'''. When an article uses both '''too many {{em|and}} overly lengthy quotations''', use neither parameter, or explicitly use {{para|both|y}} (trying {{para|many|y}}{{para|lengthy|y}} will suppress, not show, both). === Notes === This template will add tagged articles to dated subcategories of [[:Category:Wikipedia articles with style issues by month]] and to [[:Category:All articles with style issues]]. This [[Wikipedia:Template messages|template]] is a [[Wikipedia:Manual of Style/Self-references to avoid|self-reference]]. === TemplateData === {{TemplateData header}} { "params": { "1": { "label": "Affected area", "description": "Changes the affected area", "type": "string" }, "section": { "label": "Section", "description": "Marks the affected area as \"section\" instead of \"article\"", "type": "string", "autovalue": "y" }, "many": { "label": "Many", "description": "Limits the complaint to too many quotations", "type": "string", "autovalue": "y" }, "lengthy": { "label": "Lengthy", "description": "Limits it to overly lengthy quotations", "type": "string", "autovalue": "y" }, "both": { "label": "Both", "description": "Mark as both lengthy and many", "type": "string", "autovalue": "y" }, "date": { "label": "Month and year", "description": "The month and year that the template was placed (in full). \"May 2025\" inserts the current month and year automatically.", "example": "January 2013", "type": "string", "autovalue": "May 2025", "suggested": true } }, "description": "Hatnote used if there are too many and/or overly lengthy quotations in a given article.", "paramOrder": [ "section", "1", "many", "lengthy", "both", "date" ], "format": "inline" } === See also === * {{tl|Long quote}} (the inline version of this template) * [[Wikipedia:Template messages/Sources of articles]] * [[Wikipedia:Template messages/Cleanup]] {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Quotation cleanup templates]] }}

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{template shortcut|Quotefarm|Too many quotes|Excessive quotes}} === Usage === This template should not be [[Wikipedia:Substitution|substituted]]. If there are too many or overly lengthy quotations in a given article, paste this at the '''top of the article''' in question: : {{Tlx|Over-quotation|date{{=}}{{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}}} It takes a numbered or unnumbered first parameter as a substitute for the word "article", e.g. |section. Using {{para|section|yes}} or {{para|section|y}} will also output the specific word "section". Like all other cleanup templates, it accepts {{para|date|{{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}}} or |{{subst:DATE}}. For more specific wording, {{para|many|y}} limits the complaint to '''too many quotations''', while {{para|lengthy|y}} limits it to '''overly lengthy quotations'''. When an article uses both '''too many {{em|and}} overly lengthy quotations''', use neither parameter, or explicitly use {{para|both|y}} (trying {{para|many|y}}{{para|lengthy|y}} will suppress, not show, both). === Notes === This template will add tagged articles to dated subcategories of [[:Category:Wikipedia articles with style issues by month]] and to [[:Category:All articles with style issues]]. This [[Wikipedia:Template messages|template]] is a [[Wikipedia:Manual of Style/Self-references to avoid|self-reference]]. === TemplateData === {{TemplateData header}} { "params": { "1": { "label": "Affected area", "description": "Changes the affected area", "type": "string" }, "section": { "label": "Section", "description": "Marks the affected area as \"section\" instead of \"article\"", "type": "string", "autovalue": "y" }, "many": { "label": "Many", "description": "Limits the complaint to too many quotations", "type": "string", "autovalue": "y" }, "lengthy": { "label": "Lengthy", "description": "Limits it to overly lengthy quotations", "type": "string", "autovalue": "y" }, "both": { "label": "Both", "description": "Mark as both lengthy and many", "type": "string", "autovalue": "y" }, "date": { "label": "Month and year", "description": "The month and year that the template was placed (in full). \"May 2025\" inserts the current month and year automatically.", "example": "January 2013", "type": "string", "autovalue": "May 2025", "suggested": true } }, "description": "Hatnote used if there are too many and/or overly lengthy quotations in a given article.", "paramOrder": [ "section", "1", "many", "lengthy", "both", "date" ], "format": "inline" } === See also === * {{tl|Long quote}} (the inline version of this template) * [[Wikipedia:Template messages/Sources of articles]] * [[Wikipedia:Template messages/Cleanup]] {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Quotation cleanup templates]] }} [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 2 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23524127410|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{template shortcut|Quotefarm|Too many quotes|Excessive quotes}} === Usage === This template should not be [[Wikipedia:Substitution|substituted]]. If there are too many or overly lengthy quotations in a given article, paste this at the '''top of the article''' in question: : {{Tlx|Over-quotation|date{{=}}{{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}}} It takes a numbered or unnumbered first parameter as a substitute for the word "article", e.g. |section. Using {{para|section|yes}} or {{para|section|y}} will also output the specific word "section". Like all other cleanup templates, it accepts {{para|date|{{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}}} or |{{subst:DATE}}. For more specific wording, {{para|many|y}} limits the complaint to '''too many quotations''', while {{para|lengthy|y}} limits it to '''overly lengthy quotations'''. When an article uses both '''too many {{em|and}} overly lengthy quotations''', use neither parameter, or explicitly use {{para|both|y}} (trying {{para|many|y}}{{para|lengthy|y}} will suppress, not show, both). === Notes === This template will add tagged articles to dated subcategories of [[:Category:Wikipedia articles with style issues by month]] and to [[:Category:All articles with style issues]]. This [[Wikipedia:Template messages|template]] is a [[Wikipedia:Manual of Style/Self-references to avoid|self-reference]]. === TemplateData === {{TemplateData header}} { "params": { "1": { "label": "Affected area", "description": "Changes the affected area", "type": "string" }, "section": { "label": "Section", "description": "Marks the affected area as \"section\" instead of \"article\"", "type": "string", "autovalue": "y" }, "many": { "label": "Many", "description": "Limits the complaint to too many quotations", "type": "string", "autovalue": "y" }, "lengthy": { "label": "Lengthy", "description": "Limits it to overly lengthy quotations", "type": "string", "autovalue": "y" }, "both": { "label": "Both", "description": "Mark as both lengthy and many", "type": "string", "autovalue": "y" }, "date": { "label": "Month and year", "description": "The month and year that the template was placed (in full). \"May 2025\" inserts the current month and year automatically.", "example": "January 2013", "type": "string", "autovalue": "May 2025", "suggested": true } }, "description": "Hatnote used if there are too many and/or overly lengthy quotations in a given article.", "paramOrder": [ "section", "1", "many", "lengthy", "both", "date" ], "format": "inline" } === See also === * {{tl|Long quote}} (the inline version of this template) * [[Wikipedia:Template messages/Sources of articles]] * [[Wikipedia:Template messages/Cleanup]] {{Sandbox other|| }} [[Category:Quotation cleanup templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24957526818|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{template shortcut|Quotefarm|Too many quotes|Excessive quotes}} === Usage === This template should not be [[Wikipedia:Substitution|substituted]]. If there are too many or overly lengthy quotations in a given article, paste this at the '''top of the article''' in question: : {{Tlx|Over-quotation|date{{=}}{{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}}} It takes a numbered or unnumbered first parameter as a substitute for the word "article", e.g. |section. Using {{para|section|yes}} or {{para|section|y}} will also output the specific word "section". Like all other cleanup templates, it accepts {{para|date|{{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}}} or |{{subst:DATE}}. For more specific wording, {{para|many|y}} limits the complaint to '''too many quotations''', while {{para|lengthy|y}} limits it to '''overly lengthy quotations'''. When an article uses both '''too many {{em|and}} overly lengthy quotations''', use neither parameter, or explicitly use {{para|both|y}} (trying {{para|many|y}}{{para|lengthy|y}} will suppress, not show, both). === Notes === This template will add tagged articles to dated subcategories of [[:Category:Wikipedia articles with style issues by month]] and to [[:Category:All articles with style issues]]. This [[Wikipedia:Template messages|template]] is a [[Wikipedia:Manual of Style/Self-references to avoid|self-reference]]. === TemplateData === {{TemplateData header}} { "params": { "1": { "label": "Affected area", "description": "Changes the affected area", "type": "string" }, "section": { "label": "Section", "description": "Marks the affected area as \"section\" instead of \"article\"", "type": "string", "autovalue": "y" }, "many": { "label": "Many", "description": "Limits the complaint to too many quotations", "type": "string", "autovalue": "y" }, "lengthy": { "label": "Lengthy", "description": "Limits it to overly lengthy quotations", "type": "string", "autovalue": "y" }, "both": { "label": "Both", "description": "Mark as both lengthy and many", "type": "string", "autovalue": "y" }, "date": { "label": "Month and year", "description": "The month and year that the template was placed (in full). \"May 2025\" inserts the current month and year automatically.", "example": "January 2013", "type": "string", "autovalue": "May 2025", "suggested": true } }, "description": "Hatnote used if there are too many and/or overly lengthy quotations in a given article.", "paramOrder": [ "section", "1", "many", "lengthy", "both", "date" ], "format": "inline" } === See also === * {{tl|Long quote}} (the inline version of this template) * [[Wikipedia:Template messages/Sources of articles]] * [[Wikipedia:Template messages/Cleanup]] {{Sandbox other|| }} [[Category:Quotation cleanup templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
